thesis: Metal additive manufacturing company with unique 'support-free' laser powder bed fusion technology enabling true design freedom versus legacy AM, targeting mission-critical aerospace and defense applications. AS9100D aerospace certification and deepening defense relationships (U.S. Army CRADA, Navy contracts, $32.6M DoD award) underpin a guided 30-52% revenue ramp to $60-70M in 2026 with a path to EBITDA profitability by H2 2026. Precarious financials ($39M cash, -$71M TTM net loss) mean the profitability milestone must land or dilutive financing follows. High short interest (28.6% of float) on a 7.2M-share float creates squeeze potential. High-risk/high-reward speculative position, 1-3% sizing max.

drivers: Defense demand accelerates: U.S. Army CRADA, Navy contracts, and $32.6M DoD award convert into repeat system and services revenue
Support-free technology moat holds against legacy additive manufacturing competitors
EBITDA profitability lands in H2 2026, removing the dilution overhang
28.6% short interest on a 7.2M-share float fuels a squeeze on positive news
AS9100D certification opens additional aerospace primes

base_case.assumptions: Revenue lands within the guided $60-70M range (+30-52%); EBITDA breakeven approaches but arrives roughly on schedule in H2 2026; no major new defense program wins beyond existing contracts; modest dilution risk persists until profitability is confirmed.

risks: Profitability slips past H2 2026 and forces dilutive financing from a $39M cash position
Customer concentration and lumpy system sales produce a guidance miss
Defense procurement timing slips to the right
Micro-cap volatility and limited float amplify drawdowns

catalysts.event: Earnings — progress against the $60-70M FY2026 revenue guide
Path to EBITDA profitability — the make-or-break milestone for avoiding dilution
New defense contract awards building on Army CRADA, Navy work, and the $32.6M DoD award

key_risks: Precarious financials: $39M cash against a -$71M TTM net loss
Must reach profitability by H2 2026 or face dilutive financing
Customer concentration and lumpy system sales
Micro-cap volatility with a limited 7.2M-share float
High short interest cuts both ways if execution slips
